label: Data Display
description: Components for visualizing data through charts, tables, badges, timelines, and progress indicators

components.name: Badge
components.description: Inline status badge for labeling items with contextual tone colors. Supports pill and rectangular shapes.
components.whenToUse: Use to highlight status, category, or metadata inline with other content. Ideal for tags, labels, and status indicators across any page type.

props.name: children
props.description: Content to display inside the badge

props.name: tone
props.description: Semantic color tone for the badge

props.name: pill
props.description: Whether to render the badge with fully rounded pill shape

components.name: BadgeGroup
components.description: Group of badges rendered together with an optional title. Renders multiple string items as individual badges.
components.whenToUse: Use to display a collection of tags or labels together, such as blog post tags, product categories, or skill lists on portfolios.

props.name: items
props.description: Array of label strings to render as individual badges

props.name: tone
props.description: Semantic color tone applied to all badges in the group

props.name: title
props.description: Optional heading displayed above the badge group

components.name: BarChart
components.description: Vertical bar chart rendered as SVG. Supports custom dimensions, optional grid lines, configurable bar radius and padding.
components.whenToUse: Use to visualize categorical or time-series data as vertical bars. Ideal for dashboards, analytics pages, and reports comparing discrete values.

props.name: data
props.description: Array of numeric values for each bar

props.name: labels
props.description: Array of labels for the x-axis corresponding to each data point

props.name: width
props.description: Width of the chart in pixels

props.name: height
props.description: Height of the chart in pixels

props.name: title
props.description: Optional title displayed above the chart

props.name: showGrid
props.description: Whether to show horizontal grid lines

props.name: padding
props.description: Internal padding around the chart area in pixels

props.name: barRadius
props.description: Border radius of the top corners of each bar

components.name: CalendarGrid
components.description: Monthly calendar grid with date marks and optional click handler. Supports configurable start day and tone-coded marks. Use for class schedules, event calendars, booking availability displays, and appointment slot selection.
components.whenToUse: Use to display a monthly view with highlighted dates for events, bookings, or deadlines. Ideal for dashboard scheduling widgets and booking pages.

props.name: year
props.description: Full year to display (e.g. 2026)

props.name: month
props.description: Month to display (1-12)

props.name: startOn
props.description: Day the week starts on: 0 for Sunday, 1 for Monday

props.name: marks
props.description: Array of date marks: {date: number, label?: string, tone?: string}

props.name: title
props.description: Optional title displayed above the calendar

props.name: onDateClick
props.description: Callback fired when a date cell is clicked

components.name: DataTable<T>
components.description: Full-featured data table with column sorting, search filtering, and client-side pagination. Supports zebra striping and compact mode.
components.whenToUse: Use to display structured tabular data with interactive features. Essential for admin panels, dashboard data views, ecommerce order lists, and any page requiring sortable, searchable data.

props.name: columns
props.description: Array of column definitions: {key: keyof T, label: string, width?: number, align?: string, render?: (value, row) => ReactNode, sortable?: boolean}

props.name: rows
props.description: Array of row data objects matching the column keys

props.name: pageSize
props.description: Number of rows displayed per page

props.name: zebra
props.description: Whether to apply alternating row background colors

props.name: compact
props.description: Whether to use compact row height and reduced padding

props.name: caption
props.description: Optional table caption for accessibility

props.name: initialSort
props.description: Initial sort configuration: {key, dir}

props.name: searchable
props.description: Whether to show a search/filter input above the table

components.name: LineChart
components.description: SVG line chart for visualizing trends over time or sequential data points. Supports optional grid lines and axis labels.
components.whenToUse: Use to display trend data, time series, or continuous metrics. Ideal for dashboards and analytics pages showing performance over time.

props.name: data
props.description: Array of numeric values for each data point on the line

props.name: labels
props.description: Array of labels for the x-axis corresponding to each data point

props.name: width
props.description: Width of the chart in pixels

props.name: height
props.description: Height of the chart in pixels

props.name: title
props.description: Optional title displayed above the chart

props.name: showGrid
props.description: Whether to show horizontal grid lines

props.name: padding
props.description: Internal padding around the chart area in pixels

components.name: PieChart
components.description: SVG pie or donut chart for visualizing proportional data. Renders labeled segments with automatic color assignment.
components.whenToUse: Use to show composition or distribution of data. Ideal for dashboards and analytics pages displaying category breakdowns or budget allocations.

props.name: data
props.description: Array of numeric values for each pie segment

props.name: labels
props.description: Array of labels corresponding to each segment

props.name: width
props.description: Width of the chart in pixels

props.name: height
props.description: Height of the chart in pixels

props.name: title
props.description: Optional title displayed above the chart

components.name: ProgressBar
components.description: Progress indicator bar showing completion percentage. Supports labels, rounded caps, and optional trend comparison with a previous value. Also useful as skill bars in portfolios, course progress indicators, fitness tracking, and stat visualizations.
components.whenToUse: Use to indicate progress toward a goal, task completion, or loading state. Ideal for dashboards, onboarding flows, and file upload indicators.

props.name: value
props.description: Current progress value (0-100)

props.name: showLabel
props.description: Whether to display the percentage label

props.name: height
props.description: Height of the progress bar in pixels

props.name: rounded
props.description: Whether to render the bar with rounded ends

props.name: label
props.description: Optional text label displayed alongside the bar

props.name: showTrend
props.description: Whether to show a trend indicator comparing to previousValue

props.name: previousValue
props.description: Previous progress value used for trend comparison

components.name: RatingStars
components.description: Star rating display supporting fractional values. Optionally interactive for user input with customizable star count and size.
components.whenToUse: Use to display product ratings, review scores, or user feedback. Essential for ecommerce product pages, review sections, and testimonials.

props.name: value
props.description: Current rating value

props.name: outOf
props.description: Maximum number of stars

props.name: size
props.description: Size of each star in pixels

props.name: showValue
props.description: Whether to display the numeric value next to the stars

props.name: interactive
props.description: Whether users can click to set a rating

props.name: onChange
props.description: Callback fired when the user selects a rating (requires interactive=true)

components.name: Sparkline
components.description: Minimal inline chart for embedding small trend visualizations within text or table cells. No axes or labels.
components.whenToUse: Use to show compact trend data inline with other content, such as inside table cells, dashboard cards, or next to metrics.

props.name: data
props.description: Array of numeric values to plot

props.name: width
props.description: Width of the sparkline in pixels

props.name: height
props.description: Height of the sparkline in pixels

components.name: Timeline
components.description: Vertical timeline with status-coded indicators for each event. Supports done, in-progress, blocked, and todo states.
components.whenToUse: Use to display a chronological sequence of events, milestones, or changelog entries. Ideal for dashboards, portfolio case studies, and product changelogs.

props.name: items
props.description: Array of timeline items: {id: string, title: string, description?: string, time?: string, status?: "done" | "in_progress" | "blocked" | "todo"}
